Sorry for the delay in replying.

~crh

diff -ru /usr/ports/sysutils/dvdisaster/Makefile dvdisaster/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/dvdisaster/Makefile	2009-05-04 13:55:19.000000000 -0500
+++ dvdisaster/Makefile	2009-07-25 08:59:02.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	dvdisaster
-PORTVERSION=	0.70.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.72
 PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
@@ -30,6 +30,8 @@
 MAN1=	dvdisaster.1
 MANLANG=	"" cs de it
 
+PLIST_SUB=PORTVERSION=${PORTVERSION}
+
 do-configure:
 	@(cd ${CONFIGURE_WRKSRC} && \
 		if ! ${SETENV} CC="${CC}" CXX="${CXX}" \
